g.text: Cold Start Anatomy: P2P Weights, Cold JIT Caches

text.style: opacity: 1; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 19px; fill: rgb(118, 118, 118); fill-opacity: 1; font-weight: 300; white-space: pre;

g.text: DeepSeek-V4-Pro · vLLM 0.23.0 · TP8 + EP + fp8 KV cache on one 8-GPU node · load_format=modelexpress — weights arrive peer-to-peer, but every JIT kernel cache starts empty.
